# Tests that the deprecated --templates-variable flag cannot be combined with
# the new --use-templates-variable flag when the new flag is set to a
# non-default value. The two flags target the same field, so combining them
# would silently lose information.

! muxt generate --templates-variable=legacy --use-templates-variable=adminTemplates
stderr 'deprecated flag templates-variable not permitted along with use-templates-variable'

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.22
-- template.gohtml --
{{define "GET /" }}Hello{{end}}
-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var adminTemplates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*.gohtml"))
